## Outcome

Describe the user or contributor outcome in plain language.

## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests pass
- [ ] `make check` passes
- [ ] UI changes have desktop and mobile rendered proof
- [ ] No paid provider call was added to default tests

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] No credentials or private document/conversation content are logged or committed
- [ ] Migration impact is documented; released migrations were not rewritten
- [ ] Embedding-profile or reindex impact is documented
- [ ] Public documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated

## Remaining risk

List anything intentionally untested or deferred.
